SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS. (JR/525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT JIANG, HONG RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CHOW, CATHERINE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,100.00, ***IMPORTANT*** APPEAL OF TWO CLOSELY RELATED SMALL CLAIMS CASES - JIANG V. CHOW (CSM-19-861216) AND JIANG V. SINGH (CSM-19-861214) WERE TRIED DE NOVO ON JANUARY 8-9, 2020. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT HONG JIANG'S DAMAGES IN THE TWO CASES ARE THE SAME, SO THE $10,000.00 (PLUS $100 IN COSTS) PREVIOUSLY AWARDED IN EACH CASE SEPARATELY IS NOW AWARDED ONLY ONCE. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT CATHERINE CHOW AND DEFENDANT/APPELLANT PETER SINGH ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR THOSE AMOUNTS. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

APPEAL OF TWO CLOSELY RELATED SMALL CLAIMS CASES - JIANG V. CHOW (CSM-19-861216) AND JIANG V. SINGH (CSM-19-861214) WERE TRIED DE NOVO ON JANUARY 8-9, 2020 BEFORE THE HON. RICHARD B. ULMER JR. AFTER TESTIMONY, ADMISSION OF EXHIBITS, AND CLOSING ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT HONG JIANG'S DAMAGES IN THE TWO CASES ARE THE SAME, SO THE $10,000.00 (PLUS $100 IN COSTS) PREVIOUSLY AWARDED IN EACH CASE SEPARATELY IS NOW AWARDED ONLY ONCE. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT CATHERINE CHOW AND DEFENDANT/APPELLANT PETER SINGH ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR THOSE AMOUNTS. THE COURT FURTHER AFFIRMS JUDGE KARNOW'S FINDING THAT CHOW "MAY FILE HER OWN LAWSUIT, INCLUDING IF APPROPRIATE A SMALL CLAIMS CASE, TO RECOVER THE [RENT] MONEY SHE BELIEVES SHE IS OWED BY [MS. JIANG]." SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE: HON. RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: R. MICHAEL DILES; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D306)

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY ANDREW DIMITRIOU. (ALSO FILED AGAINST DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY ANDREW DIMITRIOU.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, HONG SERVED JAN-15-2020, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, CATHERINE

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

William P. Klein, Esq., for and with Plaintiff/Respondent Hong Jiang
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq. for and with Defendant/Appellant Catherine Chow

[Please see Mini-minutes for January 8, 2020 for Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibits 1-8 and Defendants/Appellants' Exhibits A-L]

Testimony resumes, having been continued from trial de novo commenced on January 8, 2020.

Mr. Klein commences examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776. Mr. Singh is reminded he is under oath.
Plaintiff's previously introduced Exhibits 1-4 are referenced; Defendant's previously introduced Exhibits C-E, G-K are referenced.
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 15 [Copy of Text message - Singh to Jiang].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 16 [E-mail with promissory note attachment - Singh to Jiang].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 10 [Copy of Text message - Singh to Jiang].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 13 [Copy of Text message - Singh to Jiang].
Mr. Klein concludes examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776. Mr. Dimitriou commences direct examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776.
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit M [list of checks from Crown Cleaners/Chow to Jiang - Demonstrative].
Mr. Dimitriou concludes direct examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776. Mr. Klein commences direct examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776.
Parties Rest.
Plaintiff's Exhibits 1-10 and 12-16 are admitted into evidence [Exhibit 6 is demonstrative]
Defendant's Exhibits A-L are admitted into evidence. Exhibit M is demonstrative.
Mr. Dimitriou presents closing argument. Mr. Klein presents closing argument.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Set For Trial On Jan-08-20 At 10:40 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Jan-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 306
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

William P. Klein, Esq., for and with Plaintiff/Respondent Hong Jiang
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq. for and with Defendant/Appellant Catherine Chow

Ms. Jiang and Ms. Chow are placed under oath.
Mr. Klein commences direct examination of Ms. Jiang.
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 [Ping An (Bank) - Jiang Credit Card Statement - $3000 - Crown Cleaners].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 2 [China Merchants Bank - Jiang Credit Card Statement - April 2019].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 3 [China Merchants Bank - Jiang Funds Transfer Application - $2600 - 7/11/19].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 4 [Check #102 - $8000 - Jiang to C. Chow - 3/31/19].
Mr. Klein concludes direct examination of Ms. Jiang.
Mr. Dimitriou commences cross-examination of Ms. Jiang.
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit A [Check #101 - $3500 - Jiang to YLLS].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit B [Check #099 - $2000 - Jiang to YLLS].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit C [Check #1629 - $2000 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit D [Check #1634 - $750 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit E [Check #1637 - $500 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit F [Check #1641 - $1250 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Recess until 1:30 p.m.
Court in session [late]. Mr. Dimitriou resumes cross-examination of Ms. Jiang.
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit G [Check #1655 - $1000 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit H [Check #1668 - $1000 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit I [Check #1669 - $1000 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit J [Check #1673 - $1100 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit K [Check #345 - $1500 - Crown Cleaners to Jiang].
Mr. Dimitriou concludes cross-examination of Ms. Jiang. Mr. Klein commences re-direct.
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 5 [Wells Fargo Bank Statements (3)].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 6 [Demonstrative - List of Charges].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 7 [Credit Card Withdrawal - Graton Casino].
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 8 [Transaction Receipt].
Mr. Klein concludes re-direct; Mr. Dimitriou commences re-cross.
Mr. Dimitriou concludes re-cross. Mr. Klein calls Catherine Chow, commences Evid. Code Sec. 776 examination.
Mr. Dimitriou commences Evid. Code Sec. 776 direct examination.
Mr. Dimitriou introduces Defendant's Exhibit L [Lease for 301 Main Street].
Mr. Dimitriou concludes Evid. Code Sec. 776 direct examination. Mr. Klein commences Evid. Code Sec. 776 re-cross examination.
Mr. Klein concludes Evid. Code Sec. 776 re-cross examination. Mr. Dimitriou commences Evid. Code Sec. 776 re-direct examination, then concludes.
Court adjourns until 9:00 a.m. January 9, 2020.
Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Atty William P. Klein of Klein Law Group for Plaintiff/Respondent Hong Jiang, who is also present.
Catherine Chow Defendant/Appellant is also present. Defendant's Atty Andrew Dimitriou of Dimitriou Law Firm is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. Matter is Continued to Wednesday January 8, 2020 at 9:00am in Department 525. The Court orders Monetary Sanctions in the amount of $550.00 against Defendant Catherine Chow and her Attorney Andrew Dimitriou. This is a joint and several obligation of Defendants (Defendant Peter Singh CSM-19-861214). Proceedings not reported; Judge: Henry Shain; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Judgment Entered
